mapper.insert:
insert into customer_product(customer_id, product_name, product_id, price, start_time, end_time) values
(#{item.customerId}, #{item.productName}, #{item.productId}, #{item.price},#{item.startTime},#{item.endTime})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM customer_product WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} AND product_id = #{productId}
mapper.select: select cp.id, cp.customer_id, cp.product_id, cp.price, cp.product_name, p.product_code, ci.unit_code, ci.unit_name,ci.id as unitId, cp.start_time, cp.end_time from customer_product cp left join product p on cp.product_id=p.id left join customer_info ci on cp.customer_id=ci.id where cp.id=#{id}

select cp.id, cp.customer_id, cp.product_id, COALESCE(cp.product_name, p.product_name) as product_name, p.product_code, ci.unit_code, ci.unit_name,cp.price, cp.start_time, cp.end_time from customer_product cp left join product p on cp.product_id=p.id left join customer_info ci on cp.customer_id=ci.id where 1=1
and ci.unit_name like concat('%',#{dto.unitName},'%')
and (cp.product_name like concat('%',#{dto.productName},'%') or p.product_name like concat('%',#{dto.productName},'%'))
order by cp.id desc
